autodetection_retry.title: Detection retry
autodetection_retry.description: Recheck interval in seconds. Zero disables retries.

url.title: Cato API URL
url.description: Cato GraphQL API endpoint. Production endpoints must use HTTPS; HTTP is accepted only for loopback test endpoints.

site_selector.title: Site selector
site_selector.description: Space-separated simple patterns matched against Cato site ID or site name. Use exclusions such as '!lab-* *'. Exclusions win across site identity fields.

interface_selector.title: Interface selector
interface_selector.description: Space-separated simple patterns matched against Cato interface ID or interface name. Use exclusions such as '!test-* *'. Exclusions win across interface identity fields.

max_sites.title: Maximum selected sites
max_sites.description: Maximum Cato sites collected after site_selector filtering. Set to 0 to disable this cap.

max_interfaces_per_site.title: Maximum interfaces per site
max_interfaces_per_site.description: Maximum interfaces collected per selected site after interface_selector filtering. Set to 0 to disable this cap.

proxy_url.title: Proxy URL
proxy_url.description: HTTP proxy URL. Empty value uses environment proxy variables.

refresh_every.title: Discovery refresh interval
refresh_every.description: Site discovery refresh interval, in seconds.

page_limit.title: Discovery page size
page_limit.description: Maximum sites requested per entityLookup page.

time_frame.title: Metrics timeframe
time_frame.description: Cato TimeFrame string used for accountMetrics, for example last.PT5M or utc.2020-02-11/{04:50:15--16:50:15}.

group_interfaces.title: Group by interfaces
group_interfaces.description: Controls the accountMetrics groupInterfaces argument. auto leaves the argument unset so Cato applies its default; enabled and disabled send explicit true or false.

max_sites_per_query.title: Maximum sites per metrics query
max_sites_per_query.description: Maximum site IDs sent in one accountMetrics query.

marker_file.title: Events marker file
marker_file.description: Optional explicit file path used to persist the eventsFeed marker. Set this when multiple jobs intentionally monitor the same account, endpoint, and vnode independently.

max_pages_per_cycle.title: Maximum EventsFeed pages per cycle
max_pages_per_cycle.description: Maximum marker pages drained from eventsFeed during one collection cycle.

max_cardinality.title: Maximum event series
max_cardinality.description: Maximum unique event type/subtype/severity/status series before excess events are collapsed into an other bucket.

refresh_every.title: BGP refresh interval
refresh_every.description: Minimum interval between BGP status refreshes, in seconds.

max_sites_per_collection.title: Maximum sites per BGP collection
max_sites_per_collection.description: Maximum sites queried for BGP status during one refresh.

peer_selector.title: BGP peer selector
peer_selector.description: Space-separated simple patterns matched against BGP peer remote IP or remote ASN. Use exclusions such as '!64512 *'. Exclusions win across BGP peer identity fields.

max_peers_per_site.title: Maximum BGP peers per site
max_peers_per_site.description: Maximum BGP peers collected per selected site after bgp.peer_selector filtering. Set to 0 to disable this cap.

attempts.title: Attempts
attempts.description: Maximum attempts for retryable Cato API errors.

vnode.title: Vnode
vnode.description: Associates this data collection job with a Virtual Node.

vnode.ui:placeholder: To use this option, first create a Virtual Node and then reference its name here.
